RichText.Text: 1. end up in... 2. end up doing sth. 3. the construction of the twin temples 4. no one can deny the fact that... 5. There is growing evidence that... 6. What made matters worse was that... 7. The reason why...was that... 8. for lack of adequate sleeping time 9. concerned by the lack of critical thinking 10. What I am concerned about most is ... 11. be entirely up to luck 12. You can rely on it that... 13. gain her a good reputation for 14. value personal privacy 15. candidates from all around the world 16. leadership development 17. further enhance your leadership skills

1. 最终陷入…… 2. 最终做了某事 3. 双庙的建造 4. 没有人能否认……这一事实 5. 越来越多的证据表明…… 6. 更糟糕的是…… 7. ……的原因是…… 8. 由于缺乏充足的睡眠时间 9. 对缺乏批判性思维感到担忧 10. 我最关心的是…… 11. 完全取决于运气 12. 你可以放心…… 13. 为她赢得了良好的声誉 14. 重视个人隐私 15. 来自世界各地的候选人 16. 领导力的发展 17. 进一步地提升/增强你的领导技能
